ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "close_last" REAL /* Previous closing price */,
  "close_first" REAL /* First closing price in the rolling window */,
  "gradient" REAL /* Gradient of the price change */,
  "gradient_pct" REAL /* Percentage gradient of the price change */,
  "rolling_days" INTEGER /* Number of days in the rolling window */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, ETF, option) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fibonacci_levels" (
  "fibonacci_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Fibonacci level entry */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data entry */,
  "fibo_236" REAL /* 23.6% Fibonacci retracement level */,
  "fibo_382" REAL /* 38.2% Fibonacci retracement level */,
  "fibo_500" REAL /* 50.0% Fibonacci retracement level */,
  "fibo_618" REAL /* 61.8% Fibonacci retracement level */,
  "fibo_764" REAL /* 76.4% Fibonacci retracement level */,
  "fibo_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the Fibonacci retracement */,
  "fibo_start_price" REAL /* Start price of the Fibonacci retracement */,
  "fibo_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the Fibonacci retracement */,
  "fibo_end_price" REAL /* End price of the Fibonacci retracement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fibonacci_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fibonacci_levels_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("market_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio (e.g., conservative, aggressive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio instrument entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the instrument */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the instrument in the portfolio */,
  "gain_loss" REAL /* Gain/loss on the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator entry */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data entry */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("market_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtests" (
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the backtest */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest period */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the backtest (e.g., profit/loss, Sharpe ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backtest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtests_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_sentiments" (
  "news_sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news sentiment entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_sentiments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the market holiday */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market affected by the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_exchanges_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "strategy_description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
